headword_jp: {突|とつ}{撃|げき}{段|だん}{階|かい}

alt_forms.note: ⚠️ WH: The exact term used in WH40K Japan and AoS Japan for the charge phase. Avoid in new projects to prevent confusion with WH IP.
Alternative with 突進 (rushing forward) and 局面 (stage). Fully neutral.

definitions.gloss_en: the phase of a turn in which units may declare and execute charges against enemy units
definitions.gloss_jp: {ユニット|ゆにっと}が{敵|てき}{ユニット|ゆにっと}に{突|とつ}{撃|げき}を{宣|せん}{言|げん}・{実|じっ}{行|こう}できる{手|て}{番|ばん}の{段|だん}{階|かい}
definitions.explanation_en: A distinct structural phase within a player's turn dedicated to charge declarations and charge moves. Typically precedes the fighting/combat phase.
definitions.implicit_notes: 突撃 (charge/rush) is a classical Japanese military command term used in WWII-era orders and historical writing. The component words are not proprietary; only the specific compound 突撃フェイズ mirrors WH Japan's branded vocabulary.
definitions.orthography_notes: 突撃段階 uses 段階 (dankai, step/stage) in place of フェイズ to create a distinct compound that avoids the WH Japan phase-naming pattern. 突撃 is a standard military Japanese compound: 突 (thrust/rush) + 撃 (strike).
definitions.game_setting_notes: Miniature wargame specific. The docx explicitly recommends 突撃段階 over 突撃フェイズ for this reason. 突撃 is attested in the Goo dictionary as a general military term.

usage_jp: {突|とつ}{撃|げき}{段|だん}{階|かい}に{突|とつ}{撃|げき}を{宣|せん}{言|げん}する (declare a charge in the charging phase)
comparative_notes: 突撃フェイズ is the WH40K/AoS Japan term and should be avoided to prevent IP ambiguity. 突撃段階 achieves the same meaning with a clearly distinct compound.

examples.japanese: {突|とつ}{撃|げき}{段|だん}{階|かい}を{開|かい}{始|し}する。

cross_references.note: フェイズ — the phase concept; why 段階 is preferred here
白兵戦段階 — fighting phase that follows charges
